title: Alphabet Flash Cards - Thick ABC Flashcards for Kids Ages 3-6 - Lower case & Upper case Letter Recognition - Learn to Read Activity
features: THE SATPIN SYSTEM: The letters are introduced to the learner in 5 levels making them easier to digest and mark progress. The colour-coded SATPIN system starts with the letters with the easiest, most frequent sounds

SEPARATE CARDS FOR UPPERCASE AND LOWERCASE: Individual flash cards for both letter cases allows children to match the capital letters with the lowercase letters or spell out words with the flash cards

GAME IDEAS AND TEACHING METHODS INCLUDED: Inside the box are 8 fun mini games and teaching methods to increase learner engagement and motivation. Teacher Designed for Preschool, Nursery or Reception Classroom

ULTRA THICK CARD STOCK: Our alphabet flashcards are made from thick, durable, stiff cardboard, sturdy enough for your child’s daily learning; They're also double-sided with engaging pictures and British English spelling

UNLOCK YOUR CHILD'S POTENTIAL WITH BAMBINO TREE! From numbers and pictures bingo to letter flashcards and sound phonics games, we offer various products for early years with effective school teaching strategies
description: Product Description Bambino Tree Learn to Read Alphabet Flash Cards Our letter sounds flash cards feature various activities and mini-games to keep your child engaged and motivated for hours . From memory games to word association challenges, there's an activity for everyone. Plus, our SATPIN level system makes it easy to introduce new letters and mark progress. Previous page Next page 1 Level 1 2 Level 2 3 Level 3 4 Level 4 5 Level 5 Following the SATPIN 5 Level Learning System Previous page Next page Our flash cards include both uppercase and lowercase letters on separate cards and a color coded system that presents letters based on ease and frequency of use. Experience the joy of mastering letters, sounds, and words, making learning a shared adventure. What makes these Alphabet Flash Cards better? The SATPIN system allows the learner to digest the learning content in chunks. All vocabulary is phonetically correct, so each word starts with the sound of the target letter. No more X is for Xylophone. All cards have British English spelling. What is the SATPIN system? The SATPIN system breaks down the alphabet into groups of 5-6 letters. Starting with the easier, more frequent letter sounds, (s,a,p,t,i,n). It allows the learner to digest and understand the letter shapes and sounds before moving to the next level. How many cards are there? 52 in total. 26 upper case flash cards and 26 lower case flash cards, featuring 104 example words and pictures. What material are the cards? Our flash cards are much thicker than card stock. They are made for 1mm thick board, meaning they cannot be easily folded or creased.
